title: New Faces of 1937
writer: Nat Perrin, Julius J. Epstein, Irving Brecher
actors: Joe Penner, Milton Berle, Harry Einstein
plot: A crooked producer tries to link his backers by producing a flop and disappearing with the money. Patricia, one of the chorus girls, has given her money too, and after the producer disappears, one of the backers is in charge of pr...
